The technology is positioned as an advancement over traditional centrifugal compressors, providing maximum speed reduction and improved efficiency for commercial

It highlights the importance of careful maintenance and proper installation of open motors in centrifugal chillers.

sellingPoints.docTitle: Induction Beams, Engineered Comfort for Today’s Buildings
sellingPoints.summary: This document is a white paper from Carrier Corporation about induction beams, an updated induction terminal for today's buildings applied in the ceiling plane. It compares induction beams to variable air volume (VAV) systems and European-style chilled beam (CB) systems.

sellingPoints.docTitle: Heat Recovery for Chilled Water Systems: Applications for Condenserless Chillers - Updated July 2022

sellingPoints.docTitle: Heat Recovery from Air-Cooled Chillers: Application for Heat Reclaim Chillers

sellingPoints.docTitle: Better Than Oil-Free: Why Screw Chillers with Pure Speed Capacity Control Save More Energy Than Magnetic Bearing Chillers
sellingPoints.summary: This document compares the energy efficiency of screw chillers with pure speed capacity control versus oil-free magnetic bearing chillers. It argues that screw chillers with pure speed capacity control save more energy than magnetic bearing chillers due to the elimination of mechanical unloaders and surge.
keyProducts: Screw Chillers with Pure Speed Capacity Control

sellingPoints.docTitle: Chilled Water System Optimizer

sellingPoints.docTitle: Underceiling Heat Pump System Indoor Model: 40MKQB48F--3;  Outdoor Model: 25HHA448A003/224ANS048000
sellingPoints.summary: This is a submittal data sheet for an underceiling heat pump system consisting of indoor model 40MKQB48F--3 and outdoor model 25HHA448A003/224ANS048000. The system is a convertible floor console/underceiling unit with a 48 size rating, offering cooling capacity of 46,400 Btu/h (SEER 14.0) and heating capacity of 46,400 Btu/h (HSPF 8.2), with operating ranges from -20°F to 125°F and features like wireless remote control, multiple operating modes, and low ambient operation capability.

sellingPoints.docTitle: Toshiba Carrier VRF Single Port Flow Selector (Long) Submittal Drawing
sellingPoints.summary: The RBM-Y0384FUL is a Single Port Flow Selector (Long) component for Toshiba Carrier VRF (Variable Refrigerant Flow) HVAC systems, designed to distribute refrigerant to multiple indoor units from a single outdoor unit connection point. It supports up to 5 connectable indoor units with individual capacities below 38 kBtu/h and allows maximum piping lengths of 164 feet between the port and indoor units. sellingPoints.docTitle: Toshiba Carrier VRF Single Phase Heat Pump Outdoor Unit, 5 Ton, 208/230-1-60
sellingPoints.summary: This document describes the Toshiba Carrier SMMS-e single VRF outdoor unit, specifically the MCY-MAP0607HS-UL model, which is a 5-ton heat pump designed for residential or commercial HVAC systems. It features an inverter-driven twin rotary compressor, wide operating temperature range, and multiple protection mechanisms, along with a 7-year compressor and 5-year parts limited warranty.
